texto: Woman is the most superstitious animal beneath the moon. When a woman has a premonition that Tuesday will be a disaster, to which a man pays no heed, he will very likely lose his fortune then. This is not meant to be an occult or mystic remark. The female body is a vessel, and the universe drops its secrets into her far more quickly than it communicates them to the male.
explicacao: Citação de Edward Dahlberg sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Woman is the most superstitious animal beneath the moon. When a woman has a premonition that Tues…” articula reflexao, moon, universe em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como universe e women.

texto: Bosch is great because what he imagines in color can be translated into justice.
